title: [v3.4] backport Flake fixes
body: Backport #12323 and #12297 [EDIT: and #12343] to fix bodhi gating-test failures

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v3.4/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@edsantiago Are these RHEL relevant? Because we swapped RHEL builds over to v3.4.2-rhel (or at least, we should have)
I'm pretty sure that at least some of them would affect RHEL gating tests. I now have it on my TODO list to check. Thanks for the heads-up.
